about_text: We offer you to use our services for the creation and improvement of your sites, whether it is one-page business cards or online stores. A creative approach to the fulfillment of the task, the desire for excellence in performance, a constructive dialogue with the Customer - these are our priorities!
project_1_description: A bank web application of 12 pages is designed to provide users with convenient access to various banking services. Users have the ability to handle account-related tasks (such as signing up, confirming accounts, signing in, recovering forgotten passwords, and updating email and password settings). Additionally, they can transfer funds, replenish their accounts using various payment systems, and access transaction and notification history.
project_2_description: A three-page business card site for an electrical installation company.
project_3_description: A web app for posting short messages and the possibility of replying with comments to them.
project_4_description: My personal resume, adaptation for any mobile devices. Preview links. Help terms. Effects for text.
work_experience_company_1_task_1: Management of the overhaul of the AllstarsIT office.
work_experience_company_2_task_1: Objects of state and commercial order.
work_experience_company_3_task_1: Overhaul of premises of state and commercial objects.
work_experience_company_4_task_1: Maintenance of the online store website.
education_institution_1_direction: The direction of study: Fullstack developer JavaScript, React, Node.js
